description: A comprehensive script for initializing, managing, and configuring a PostgreSQL database server, including setup of user roles, permissions, and environment variables.

methods.name: Initialization of PostgreSQL
methods.description: Initializes PostgreSQL data directory if not already initialized.

methods.name: Start PostgreSQL server
methods.description: Starts the PostgreSQL server process in the background.

methods.name: Setup database
methods.description: Creates database and user roles, sets permissions, and configures default privileges.

methods.name: Save connection info and environment variables
methods.description: Stores connection string in a file and writes environment variables for external tools.
